title: lithraea ternifolia
intro: Lithraea ternifolia, also known as the Chilean Soapbark Tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Anacardiaceae. The bark of this tree has been used for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lithraea ternifolia include treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating skin conditions such as acne and eczema. Herbal preparations of Lithraea ternifolia can be found in teas, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to treat a variety of health issues.
